_readme: Copy this file to secrets.json in the same folder, fill the REPLACE_ME values, then lock it: icacls secrets.json /inheritance:r /grant:r 12534:F  — secrets.json is never committed and never duplicated into environment variables.

gt40._note: Custom app on the GT40 Marine store, Admin API scopes read_orders + read_products

noodlebomb._note: Custom app on the NoodleBomb store, Admin API scopes read_orders + read_products

amazon_sp_api._note: Week 2. Values migrated from existing user-scope env vars via [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable(name,'User') — do NOT re-provision.
